_notes: Hardened: added Model Tenancy Act 2021 compliance, explicit registration clause, stamp duty notice.

conditional_clauses.note: Permitted use clause mandatory for commercial leases

mandatory_legal_checks: Registration Act 1908 S.17 — leases exceeding 12 months must be registered; unregistered lease inadmissible as evidence
Transfer of Property Act 1882 S.105-106 — lease definition and month-to-month termination notice
Model Tenancy Act 2021 — security deposit limited to 2 months for residential, 6 months for commercial
Stamp duty — varies by state and term; Maharashtra: 0.25% of total rent; Delhi: Rs.50 flat
TDS on rent — S.194I applies when annual rent exceeds Rs.2.4 lakhs (TDS @ 10% on commercial property)
